catalysts.note: No scheduled catalysts today or tomorrow. Next week is loaded: FOMC decision Wed 06-17, quad-witching options expiration Thu 06-18.

bias.analyst: Markets are closed. Theo forms its bias after the first 30 minutes of trading - committing to a direction before the opening range resolves is guessing, and the lab does not guess.
bias.commentator: The stadium is dark, the pitch is being watered. Team talk happens at 9:15 ET, kickoff at 9:30. Theo never predicts the score before the whistle.

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.
